basics.name: Prabhav Singh
basics.label: NLP Research
basics.summary: Aims to work in the applications of deep learning in NLP and Speech Processing in an academic role at a University or Research Laboratory and aspires to develop systems that improve the level of Human-Computer Interaction. My long-term goal is to obtain my Ph.D. in the discipline, and my short-term goal is to conduct original research in the field under the guidance of experienced professionals.

work.name: Zyient.io
work.summary: Delivered an automated claim and invoice processing tool for a global medical insurance organisation using a custom LayoutLM based architecture in parallel with an original table association algorithm to construct tables from extracted data. Reduced processing time by 40% and improved accuracy by 25%. Developed a novel approach; CaTT (Cascading Table Transformer), to automate unsupervised annotation of tables present in any document format. The approach outperforms existing solutions in the market while also being agnostic of the field of documents.

work.name: Data Platform Engineer
work.summary: Worked at the EDP (Entity Data Platform) team at Ola to enhance and optimize the data pipelines for the electrical vehicle business of the organization.

awards.title: Premier Research Award 2022
awards.summary: Awarded the Premier Research Excellence Award (2022) at DU, for publishing 2 papers in a journal with IF > 8.

awards.title: Premier Research Award 2023
awards.summary: Awarded the Premier Research Excellence Award (2023) at DU, for publishing 1 paper in a journal with IF > 8.
